title: AwardsWatch - Golden Globe Nomination Predictions – Television: Best Actress Drama
text: According to AwardsWatch's predictions, the following actresses were predicted to receive Golden Globe nominations for Best Actress in a Television Series – Drama: Jennifer Aniston ("The Morning Show"), Kathy Bates ("Matlock"), Britt Lower ("Severance"), Keri Russell ("The Diplomat"), Rhea Seehorn ("Pluribus"), and Reese Witherspoon ("The Morning Show"). Alternative contenders noted included Carrie Coon ("The Gilded Age"), Elisabeth Moss ("The Handmaid's Tale"), and Carrie Preston ("Elsbeth"). Notably, Britt Lower was highlighted as a particularly strong contender, having "won an Emmy for Outstanding Lead Actress in a Drama" for her role in "Severance."
